goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 3
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee
